Class NativeCPULinearAlgebraBackend

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.nativ.mathematics.linearalgebra.matrices.backends.NativeCPULinearAlgebraBackend
All Implemented Interfaces:
LinearAlgebraProvider<Real>, AlgorithmProvider, Backend, ComputeBackend, LibraryBackend
@AutoService({ComputeBackend.class,LibraryBackend.class,AlgorithmProvider.class}) public class NativeCPULinearAlgebraBackend extends Object implements ComputeBackend, LibraryBackend, LinearAlgebraProvider<Real>
Native BLAS/LAPACK backend using OpenBLAS or Intel MKL via Panama FFM.

Provides both low-level BLAS operations (dgemm, dgemv, etc.) and high-level LinearAlgebraProvider operations for Real elements. Implements

invalid reference 
NativeBackend
to properly participate in native backend discovery.

Since:
1.1
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    • createContext

      public ExecutionContext createContext()
      Description copied from interface: ComputeBackend
      Creates an execution context for running operations.

      The context should be used within a try-with-resources block to ensure proper cleanup of resources.

      Specified by:
      createContext in interface ComputeBackend
      Returns:
      new execution context
